subcodes.first_line: O dear friend! The contents of your letter to Mr. Molk have become known to me... You have written that there were several meetings of joy and happiness
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوست عزیز نامه که بمستر ملک مرقوم نموده بودید بر مضامین آن اطلاع حاصل شد
subcodes.subjects: @race unity; racial issues, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @unity; oneness of humanity
